overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a science fiction game (Star Citizen) showing a player walking along a foggy industrial waterfront dock at dusk. The player ascends an exterior metal staircase to an upper platform leading to a hangar entrance, featuring futuristic architecture with blue neon lighting and reflective water surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront promenade with docking gantries

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront pathway toward the distant industrial structures

entered.detail: futuristic metal walkway with blue illuminated strip down the center
calm water surface reflecting the industrial structures and hazy sky
large industrial gantry crane silhouetted against the hazy red sky across the water
futuristic industrial structures and platforms lining the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy industrial waterfront at dusk. The camera moves forward along a illuminated concrete pathway with reflective water to the right. Across the water, large gantry cranes and industrial platforms are visible through the haze, silhouetted against the reddish sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior metal staircase with glass railings

events.description: turns left from waterfront path and begins ascending the metal staircase
reaches the top of the stairs and transitions to the upper platform level

agents.ego_description: turning left toward the staircase and climbing the metal steps to the upper docking level

entered.detail: metal stairs with red treads and illuminated edges leading upward
transparent glass panels with metal frames lining the left side of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The player turns left from the waterfront path and ascends an exterior metal staircase with glass railings. The stair treads feature red surfaces with integrated lighting. As the player climbs, the view of the water recedes, and the gantry crane shifts to the right side of the frame before the player reaches the upper platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level hangar entrance with glass partitions

events.description: enters the sheltered upper platform area with glass partition walls
passes through glass partition into the hangar approach corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper platform toward the hangar entrance, passing glass partitions

entered.detail: transparent glass walls with metal frames marking the hangar entrance area
illuminated overhead sign displaying HANGAR with directional arrows and distance markers
red carpet or flooring material covering the upper platform walkway
long rectangular light fixtures mounted on the ceiling providing illumination

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the top of the stairs and enters a semi-enclosed upper platform with glass partition walls and red flooring. An illuminated overhead sign indicates the direction to the HANGAR. The player walks forward through the glass-enclosed approach corridor toward the hangar entrance, with the industrial waterfront now obscured by the structure and distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a foggy industrial waterfront at dusk into the structured interior of a futuristic hangar approach. It begins by moving forward along an illuminated concrete pathway, where reflective water borders the right side and gantry cranes stand silhouetted against a reddish, hazy sky. As the camera turns left, it ascends an exterior metal staircase with red treads and glass railings, causing the waterfront view to recede and the industrial cranes to shift toward the edge of the frame. The scene then transitions onto a semi-enclosed upper platform with red flooring and glass partition walls, guided by an illuminated overhead sign pointing toward the hangar. Finally, the camera moves through a glass-enclosed corridor, leaving the open industrial landscape behind as it approaches the hangar entrance.
